title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation
text: Retrieval-augmented generation, or RAG, answers a user question by retrieving external passages and grounding the generated response in that context.

title: MutOracle-RAG Goal
text: MutOracle-RAG localizes hallucination faults by applying controlled mutations to retrieval, prompt construction, and generation stages, then comparing oracle score deltas.

title: FITS Dataset
text: FITS is planned as a frozen single-stage fault-injection split used to evaluate whether a method can identify the pipeline stage that caused a RAG failure.

title: OpenRouter Provider
text: The project uses OpenRouter through an OpenAI-compatible chat completions API, with model identifiers stored in configuration and run metadata.

title: Mutation Operators
text: The canonical mutation operators are CI, CR, CS, QP, QN, FS, and FA, grouped across retrieval, prompt, and generation stages.
